text:
Bladge (ブラッヂ, Burajji) was a Royal Bodyguard for Prince Momoze Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 361 until her death, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 368 serving also as a spy for Queen Tang Zhao Li. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 366 

Appearance

Bladge has parted hair, freckles, a flat nose, and prominent cheeks. As a Royal Bodyguard, he wears a black suit and a tie. 

Personality

Bladge shows an obligation to stay and protect his client, even when ordered to protect Prince Marayam. This, however, may have been a ploy to continue spying on her as he's a spy for Queen Tang Zhao. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

On Queen Sevanti's orders, Prince Momoze's bodyguards are transferred over to Prince Marayam. However, both Bladge and Nipaper insist on continue being Prince Momoze's bodyguards, to which the prince praises them for their loyalty. With no one else able to prepare supper, Bladge cooks her a meal, impressing Nipaper. 

As Prince Momoze rests in her bedroom, Bladge, Nipaper, Vict, and Laroc stand guard outside her room, while Tuffdy patiently waits to assassinate the prince. After Prince Momoze's murder, Bladge, along with the other bodyguards, are taken into custody by the Kakin Army to be interrogated about the murder as Queen Sevanti accusing all of them to have conspired together and asking for the capital punishment. 

Abilities & Powers

Bladge is a licensed chef.
